title: Destrieux Cortical Atlas — destrieux
text: Brain atlas Destrieux cortical parcellation (aparc.a2009s) 75 regions per hemisphere. Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain().

title: Destrieux Cortical Atlas — destrieux
text: Destrieux C, Fischl B, Dale , Halgren E (2010). Automatic parcellation human cortical gyri sulci using standard anatomical nomenclature. NeuroImage, 53(1), 1-15. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2010.06.010

title: Destrieux Cortical Atlas — destrieux
code: destrieux() #>  #> ── destrieux ggseg atlas ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Type: cortical #> Regions: 74 #> Hemispheres: left, right #> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior #> Palette: ✔ #> Rendering: ✔ ggseg #> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices) #> ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> # A tibble: 148 × 3 #>     hemi  region                    label                        #>     <chr> <chr>                     <chr>                        #>   1 left  G_and_S_frontomargin      lh_G_and_S_frontomargin      #>   2 title: Desikan-Killiany-Tourville Cortical Atlas — dkt
text: Cortical parcellation 32 regions per hemisphere based Desikan-Killiany-Tourville labeling protocol. Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Desikan-Killiany-Tourville Cortical Atlas — dkt
text: Klein , Tourville J (2012). 101 labeled brain images consistent human cortical labeling protocol. Frontiers Neuroscience, 6:171. doi:10.3389/fnins.2012.00171

title: Desikan-Killiany-Tourville Cortical Atlas — dkt
code: dkt() #>  #> ── dkt ggseg atlas ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Type: cortical #> Regions: 31 #> Hemispheres: left, right #> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior #> Palette: ✔ #> Rendering: ✔ ggseg #> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices) #> ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> # A tibble: 62 × 3 #>    hemi  region                   label                       #>    <chr> <chr>                    <chr>                       #>  1 left  caudalanteriorcingulate  lh_caudalanteriorcingulate  #>  2 left  caudalmiddlefrontal      lh_caudalmiddlefrontal      #>  3 left  cuneus                   lh_cuneus                   #>  4 left  entorhinal               lh_entorhinal               #>  5 left  fusiform lh_parahippocampal          #> 15 left  paracentral              lh_paracentral              #> 16 left  parsopercularis          lh_parsopercularis          #> 17 left  parsorbitalis lh_precuneus                #> 24 left  rostralanteriorcingulate lh_rostralanteriorcingulate #> 25 left  rostralmiddlefrontal     lh_rostralmiddlefrontal     #> 26 left  superiorfrontal what: ggsegFreeSurfer: FreeSurfer Brain Atlases for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegFreeSurfer-package
title: ggsegFreeSurfer: FreeSurfer Brain Atlases for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegFreeSurfer-package
text: FreeSurfer cortical subcortical brain atlases 'ggseg' ecosystem. Includes Desikan-Killiany-Tourville cortical atlas (Klein & Tourville 2012), Destrieux cortical atlas (Destrieux et al. 2010), HCP subcortical atlas anterior/posterior hippocampus subdivisions. Provides unified 'ggseg_atlas' objects 2D polygon geometry 3D mesh vertex data, use 'ggseg' 'ggseg3d'.

title: ggsegFreeSurfer: FreeSurfer Brain Atlases for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegFreeSurfer-package
text: Maintainer: Athanasia Mo Mowinckel .m.mowinckel@psykologi.uio.(ORCID) Authors: Didac Vidal-Piñeiro d.v.pineiro@psykologi.uio.(ORCID)

title: HCP Subcortical Atlas — hcpa
text: Human Connectome Project subcortical atlas aseg regions anterior/posterior hippocampus subdivisions. Contains 3D mesh geometry ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: HCP Subcortical Atlas — hcpa
code: hcpa() #>  #> ── hcpa ggseg atlas ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Type: subcortical #> Regions: 34 #> Hemispheres: subcort #> Palette: ✔ #> Rendering: ✖ ggseg #> ✔ ggseg3d (meshes) #> ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> # A tibble: 34 × 3 #>    hemi    region                        label                         #>    <chr>   <chr>                         <chr>                         #>  1 subcort Left-Lateral-Ventricle        Left-Lateral-Ventricle        #>  2 subcort Left-Inf-Lat-Vent 4th-Ventricle                 #> 11 subcort Brain-Stem                    Brain-Stem                    #> 12 subcort Left-Amygdala                 Left-Amygdala                 #> 13 subcort Left-Accumbens-area           Left-Accumbens-area           #> 14 subcort Left-VentralDC                Left-VentralDC                #> 15 subcort Right-Lateral-Ventricle       Right-Lateral-Ventricle       #> 16 subcort Right-Inf-Lat-Vent            Right-Inf-Lat-Vent            #> 17 subcort Right-Cerebellum-White-Matter Right-Cerebellum-White-Matter #> 18 subcort Right-Cerebellum-Cortex       Right-Cerebellum-Cortex       #> 19 subcort Right-Thalamus-Proper         Right-Thalamus-Proper         #> 20 subcort Right-Caudate                 Right-Caudate Right-Amygdala                #> 24 subcort Right-Accumbens-area          Right-Accumbens-area          #> 25 subcort Right-VentralDC               Right-VentralDC               #> 26 subcort title: ggsegFreeSurfer 1.0.0
text: Initial release bundling FreeSurfer atlases ggsegDKT, ggsegDestrieux, ggsegDefaultExtra Includes dkt(), destrieux(), hcpa() atlas accessors dkextra() removed
